text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I have to do well in this race if I want to run in the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Rice. You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, right! I'll be back soon, Big Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, right! I'll be back soon, Big Sister!
